body: assertEquals("T3: Wrong number of Deps for T3", 1, t3SDeps.size());
assertEquals("T3: Wrong thing at pos 0", T3, t3SDeps.get(0));
assertEquals("T2: Wrong number of Deps for T2", 2, t2SDeps.size());
assertEquals("T2: Wrong thing at pos 0", T3, t2SDeps.get(0));
assertEquals("T2: Wrong thing at pos 1", T2, t2SDeps.get(1));
assertEquals("T1: Wrong number of Deps for T1", 3, t1SDeps.size());
assertEquals("T1: Wrong thing at pos 0", T3, t1SDeps.get(0));
assertEquals("T1: Wrong thing at pos 1", T2, t1SDeps.get(1));
assertEquals("T1: Wrong thing at pos 2", T1, t1SDeps.get(2));
assertEquals("T1: Wrong number of dependents.", 5, t1SDeps.size());
assertEquals("T2: Wrong number of dependents.", 3, t2SDeps.size());
assertEquals("T1: Wrong number of dependents.", 1, t3SDeps.size());
assertEquals("T4: Wrong number of dependents.", 1, t4SDeps.size());
assertEquals("T5: Wrong number of dependents.", 1, t5SDeps.size());
